temporal_refs.description: Initial malformed and corrected hard-gate attempts occurred before the 2026-05-27 safe-claim fix run.
Belief Ledger commit 22b5839 was verified and used for the compaction-preservation rerun.
Belief Ledger commit 1c89d45 was verified and used for the successful candidate-risk gate rerun.
Proof 013 fixture conversion and replay comparison were produced after the candidate-risk gate passed.
